data.name: A Femboy Polished My Knob
data.detailed_description:
Male on Femboy

One day while browsing a gay hookup app, you just so happen to find your type. 

He's cute, he's feminine, and he's available. But first, you have to play your cards right and tickle his fancy, and after showcasing your fun, adventurous side, Cinnamon invites you over.

What happens next will blow your mind... 💦

Read through some pretty raunchy(erotic) dialogue, accompanied by spicy nude depictions.

Gameplay

  • Kinetic Visual Novel

  • H-Scenes

  • ~3K words

Immerse yourself in the story by typing in your own name, then proceeding to read through a raunchy story from the first-person perspective.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 400 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
